codeReview.summary: The follow-up is implemented correctly: VAL-CTXEXP-006 now points at the XML-sensitive export test, and m1-context-pack-core finalization now has a built-in default report set.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The XML-safety naming guidance is still split across docs: the current test file uses `test_xmlSensitiveKeyFilesAndCommandsPreserveEnvelopeIntegrity`, but validation-contract.md still names `test_xmlSensitiveBodyPreservesEnvelopeIntegrity`. A doc refresh would reduce future annotation drift.

The flow-report guidance for m1-context-pack-core is now stale in user-testing.md; it still says no milestone default exists and instructs passing the four filenames explicitly, even though the script now resolves them by default.

summary: The feature's functional changes are correct and verified; only guidance/docs drift remains for follow-up cleanup.
